stemHtml: Which of the below situations is most likely to yield the most turbulence on final approach?

options.a:
Time: in the afternoon;
Winds aloft: weak;
Airport: flat terrain, rain reported by the ATIS.
options.b:
Time: early in the morning;
Winds aloft: weak;
Airport: slightly hilly terrain, patches of fog.
options.c:
Time: in the afternoon;
Winds aloft: strong;
Airport: lacking in uniformity, rough terrain.
options.d:
Time: early in the morning;
Winds aloft: weak;
Airport: at the bottom of a basin, overcast sky.
